node.title: JSP 10K 14K 18K Gold Jewelry Acid Testing Kit Solutions Bottles Coins Bars Scrap Oro Appraise Checker
node.description: Quickly verify the purity and authenticity of gold jewelry, coins, bars, and scrap gold with this easy-to-use JSP Gold Testing Kit. Designed for jewelers, gold buyers, pawn shops, collectors, and refiners, this kit uses the trusted acid testing method to help identify gold karat content with reliable results. Simply scratch your item on a testing stone (sold separately or use your existing one), apply a drop of testing acid, and observe the reaction to determine the gold purity. Why Choose JSP Testing Solutions Unlike many gold testing kits on the market, JSP testing acids are never imported and are always produced fresh, helping ensure accurate and consistent results. • Bottles are up to 3× larger than many competing kits• Freshly produced acids for dependable testing results• Trusted JSP formulas used by professionals for decades• Manufactured in the USA Kit Includes • (1) JSP 10K Gold Testing Acid – 0.5 oz (14 g)• (1) JSP 14K Gold Testing Acid – 0.5 oz (14 g)• (1) JSP 18K Gold Testing Acid – 0.5 oz (14 g) Includes easy-to-follow instructions to help you quickly interpret test results. Perfect For Testing • Gold jewelry• Scrap gold• Gold coins and bullion• Estate jewelry and thrift store finds The compact bottles make this kit easy to carry in a pocket, purse, or tool kit, making it ideal for testing gold on the go. A must-have tool for anyone who buys, sells, or invests in gold.

node.title: Default Title
JSP Gold 10K & 14K Jewelry Testing Acid Tester Kit + Scratch Stone Detect Precious Metals
node.description: This JSP Gold Testing Kit is designed for fast, accurate karat verification using fresh, USA-made JSP testing solutions. Unlike many imported or old acids on the market, JSP acids are bottled fresh to deliver consistent, reliable reactions you can trust. Testing is simple. Scratch your item on the test stone, apply a drop of acid, and observe the reaction to determine gold purity in seconds. No complicated steps. No guesswork. What’s included: JSP 10K Gold Testing Acid Solution 0.5 oz (14 g) JSP 14K Gold Testing Acid Solution 0.5 oz (14 g) GTE 2" x 2" Premium Test Stone Easy-to-read instruction guide Each 0.5 oz bottle provides hundreds of tests and offers more usable product than many competitor kits that include tiny sample vials. The compact size makes this kit easy to store, travel with, or keep on hand for on-the-go testing. Ideal for investors, resellers, collectors, jewelers, and pawn shops who need dependable gold testing without cutting corners. A must-have tool for anyone serious about verifying gold accurately and confidently.

node.title: Default Title
JSP Gold Silver & Platinum Jewelry Acid Tester Kit w/ Scratch Stone for Precious Metals Detect Plating Bars Coins
node.description: JSP & GTE Gold, Silver & Platinum Testing Kit Complete 6-Solution Professional Set Test gold, silver, and platinum with confidence using genuine JSP & GTE testing solutions trusted by professionals since 1980. JSP acids are manufactured in the United States and are never imported. Freshness and consistency matter when verifying precious metals, and every batch is produced to professional standards. Bottles ship sealed and are typically less than two weeks old to ensure reliable, accurate reactions. Unlike many low-cost imported kits, these 0.5 oz bottles are approximately three times the size of many competitor bottles. Each bottle provides enough solution for hundreds of tests, delivering real long-term value. What’s Included • JSP 10K Gold Testing Solution• JSP 14K Gold Testing Solution• JSP 18K Gold Testing Solution• JSP 22K Gold Testing Solution• JSP Silver Testing Solution• JSP Platinum Testing Solution• GTE 2" x 2" Premium Scratch Test Stone with non-slip rubber backing• Easy-to-follow instruction booklet with color comparison chart Simple 3-Step Testing Make a small scratch on the included test stone. Apply a drop of the appropriate testing solution. Compare the reaction to determine authenticity and purity. Ideal For • Jewelry buyers and resellers• Pawn shops and estate purchasers• Coin and bullion collectors• Scrap metal refiners• Investors verifying precious metals When you are testing real value, do not rely on imported, diluted, or inconsistently formulated acids. Choose a U.S.-manufactured brand with over four decades of professional use and larger bottles that deliver more tests per kit. If you have questions, we’re here to help. Neutralizer sold separately and can be found here: Neutralizer Solution

node.description: JSP Gold Testing Kit 5-Piece Professional Gold Appraisal Set This easy-to-use testing kit is built with genuine JSP gold testing acids, trusted by jewelers and metal professionals since 1980, and designed to accurately determine the karat and purity of gold jewelry, scrap, bars, and coins. Why JSP Gold Testing Acids Matter Most gold testing kits on the market rely on small, imported acids that sit too long and lose effectiveness. This kit does not. • Never imported testing acids• Manufactured in the USA by JSP, a trusted name since 1980• Full 0.5 oz bottles, up to 3× larger than many competitors• Always fresh for consistent, reliable results• Each bottle performs hundreds of tests Fresh acid matters. Old or diluted acid leads to inaccurate readings. This kit is built for real testing, not guesswork. Simple, Proven Testing Process Scratch your item on the test stone, apply a drop of the appropriate testing solution, and observe the reaction. Results appear quickly and clearly using the included color chart and instructions. What’s Included. 5-Piece Kit • JSP 10K Gold Testing Acid Solution 0.5 oz• JSP 14K Gold Testing Acid Solution 0.5 oz• JSP 18K Gold Testing Acid Solution 0.5 oz • GTE 2 x 2 inch Premium Scratch Test Stone– Non-slip rubber backing for safe desktop testing • Easy-to-follow instruction booklet with color chart Built for Portability and Real Use The compact size makes this kit ideal for estate sales, shops, travel, and on-the-go testing, while the full-size bottles provide long-term value and repeat use. Ideal For • Gold investors• Jewelry buyers and sellers• Estate sale and auction shoppers• Collectors and hobbyists Test with confidence using fresh, American-made JSP gold testing acids trusted for decades

node.title: Default Title
GTE 2''x2'' Small Premium Black Scratch Touchstone for Acid Gold Silver Platinum Jewelry Testing
node.description: The GTE Premium Testing Scratch Stone is an essential tool used to determine the purity and authenticity of gold, silver, and platinum when used with testing acids. This durable touchstone allows you to create a visible metal streak that reacts with testing solutions, helping you quickly evaluate precious metals. Compact, reliable, and easy to use, this testing stone is widely used by jewelers, pawn shops, refiners, and precious metal buyers for everyday metal testing. Product Includes • GTE Premium 2" × 2" Scratch Test Stone• Rubber backing for stable, non-slip desktop testing Testing acids sold separately. How to Use Scratch the item you want to test across the surface of the stone, leaving a visible metal streak about 1 inch long. Apply a drop of testing acid to the streak using the solution that corresponds to the metal you are testing. Observe the reaction and compare the results using your testing chart to determine the metal purity. Ideal For Testing • Gold jewelry• Silver jewelry• Platinum jewelry• Coins and bullion• Scrap precious metals A must-have testing tool for anyone who buys, sells, refines, or collects precious metals.
